title: EpicChat
description: Adds hex colors, style formatting and chat layout customization to your server.
body:
# EpicChat
A chat formatting mod focused on giving Fabric server owners control over their chat aesthetics. LuckPerms support is built in and highly recommended!

NOTE: I will probably not be supporting or updating NeoForge and Forge because I don't feel like it! 
## Current Features:
- Use legacy (&) color/formatting codes and hex (&#) color codes in chat
- Change the default chat format to whatever you want
- Add and remove nicknames with /nick and /delnick. This supports color codes 
- Prefixes and suffixes are supported via LuckPerms
- Permission nodes are supported via LuckPerms
![Screenshot of ingame chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653d9d033a4bfb62abfd28bd74f83afdaa8a0b6d_0.webp)
## Command Usage & Permission Nodes:
/nick <nickname> | Changes your nickname.

- epicchat.nick

/delnick | Deletes your nickname.

- epicchat.delnick

/delnickfor <username> | Deletes another players nickname.

- epicchat.delnickfor

/nickfor <username> <nickname> | Changes another players nickname.

- epicchat.nickfor

Allows hex (&#abc123) and legacy (&a-f, &0-9) colors.

- epicchat.color.hex
- epicchat.color.legacy

Allows chat styles
Bold: &l

- epicchat.style.bold

Italic: &o

- epicchat.style.italic

Obfuscated: &k

- epicchat.style.obfuscated

Strikethrough: &m

- epicchat.style.strikethrough

Underline: &n

- epicchat.style.underline

## Issues:
- Disabling options in the config file will also disable them in the chat formatting. You probably want to use LuckPerms to deny the usage via permissions instead.


There is currently no way to get ahold of me if there are any issues with the mod, but surely I will remember to set this up later!
